arguments.summary: JSON output works correctly — shows total/errors/warnings/info counts plus full entries array with all fields serialized. Tested with sample.log: 3 entries (1 ERROR, 1 WARN, 1 INFO).
arguments.final_answer:
Added JSON output format to log parser:
1. Cargo.toml — added serde (with derive) and serde_json dependencies.
2. src/parser.rs — added #[derive(Serialize)] to LogEntry.
3. src/output.rs — added format_json() using serde_json::json! macro. Outputs summary counts plus full entries array.
4. src/main.rs — added --json flag parsing. When present, outputs JSON; otherwise plain text.
Tested with sample.log — correct JSON with 3 entries and accurate counts.
